scenario_content:
[Issue Title]: Lost draft text after process death [Post 1]: ok, so I just wrote an e-mail and lost the text while switching between applications. sad times :'( it saved it in drafts successfully several times. but then, I switched back to k9 again, added even more images (in the end there were 20 attachments), I looked down and my text was just gone. the attachments were all still there, even my change to the signature was still there. but the text was gone. one possible cause could be the unreliable mobile network connection I was running on at that point. (it had a few hiccups, before it got stable again), I was riding a train and right after I left it, gone anyways I would be glad (in the name of every user) if you could take a look at what could have caused this at some point, thank you :) I won't get the mail back and that is fine, just sad I won't try to reproduce this with logging enabled. (too exhausting and too many possible causes) I'm running a oneplus 3T, stock firmware but not up to date, Android 7.0 one possible cause: sometimes my phone randomly kills background applications that use too much power (not the usual android way, a custom thing by oneplus) it's something I can't disable sadly maybe they removed it in a newer version If you can't think of a reason for the data loss, then you should give up. but I think it's more likely a bug in the app that can be fixed :) Regards [Post 2]: and now the attachments are gone as well... :/ [Post 3]: This could be issue 2581 -- that would explain the existence of attachments even as the body text is lost [Post 4]: I'm on LineageOS 16, Android Pie, and when I intentionally save drafts, while having the app set to not be optimized with battery use, I only occasionally lose all draft content. It was like this before I switched to 16. I have multiple accounts, and it does not seem to be a domain issue vs domain with sudomain addressing. It does not appear to involve the use of the clipboard. It's a glitchy problem. Maybe there is something running async that shouldn't be. I cannot make it happen. Edit: I read 2581 and yes, this is what I experience. The html version is online. Drafts save fine when just text. Add a hyperlink and they seem to fail sometimes. Version 5.6. [Post 5]: Not sure if it helps but here are Log Files from dovecot on my server: Jul 30 07:49:47 mx dovecot: imap-login: Login: user=, method=PLAIN, rip=192.168.10.2, lip=10.0.40.3, mpid=29855, TLS, **session=<4uICm+SOJ+LAqAoC>** Jul 30 07:49:48 mx dovecot: imap-login: Login: user=, method=PLAIN, rip=192.168.10.2, lip=10.0.40.3, mpid=29859, TLS, **session=** Are the above two instances of connections normal like this for imap? I was on OpenVPN. Started the message: Jul 30 07:51:04 mx dovecot: imap(support@education.domain.org): delete: box=Drafts, uid=16, msgid=<4662E43D-E956-4E57-A666-7FB56E6D1B24@education.domain.org>, size=1487, from=, subject=Trouble Logging into Education Jul 30 07:51:04 mx dovecot: imap(support@education.domain.org): expunge: box=Drafts, uid=16, msgid=<4662E43D-E956-4E57-A666-7FB56E6D1B24@education.domain.org>, size=1487, from=, subject=Trouble Logging into Education Switched to grab a URL and came back, entered the URL: Jul 30 07:51:30 mx dovecot: imap(support@education.domain.org): delete: box=Drafts, uid=17, msgid=<**F9C2CB1C-B42B-48CA-B048-6666D081E3E1**@education.domain.org>, size=1229, from=, subject=Trouble Logging into Education Jul 30 07:51:30 mx dovecot: imap(support@education.domain.org): expunge: box=Drafts, uid=17, msgid=<**F9C2CB1C-B42B-48CA-B048-6666D081E3E1**@education.domain.org>, size=1229, from=, subject=Trouble Logging into Education The I switched again and came back but it was empty. So I deleted in. Online, I found it in the trash and message F9C2CB1C-B42B-48CA-B048-6666D081E3E1 confirmed to not have text, but has html: ------1VZ85MG2AP5NPY3WPTMI4HXLNTUFKR Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable ------1VZ85MG2AP5NPY3WPTMI4HXLNTUFKR Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Hi Bob,

Our records indicate [the rest of content removed]

Thanks! ------1VZ85MG2AP5NPY3WPTMI4HXLNTUFKR--
system_prompt:
你是一位经验丰富的软件工程师和项目管理者，专注于软件系统中的价值风险分析。
你的任务是分析给定的GitHub Issue讨论内容，识别其中涉及的人类价值关切。

价值风险是指软件系统可能对用户或利益相关者的重要价值（如隐私、安全、公平性、可用性等）产生负面影响的潜在问题。
Issue讨论中可能包含用户对软件行为的不满、功能请求、Bug报告等，这些内容可能隐含对某些价值的关切。
user_prompt:

(it had a few hiccups, before it got stable again), I was riding a train and right after I left it, gone anyways I would be glad (in the name of every user) if you could take a look at what could have caused this at some point, thank you :) I won't get the mail back and that is fine, just sad I won't try to reproduce this with logging enabled. (too exhausting and too many possible causes) I'm running a oneplus 3T, stock firmware but not up to date, Android 7.0 one possible cause: sometimes my phone randomly kills background applications that use too much power (not the usual android way, a custom thing by oneplus) it's something I can't disable sadly maybe they removed it in a newer version If you can't think of a reason for the data loss, then you should give up. but I think it's more likely a bug in the app that can be fixed :) Regards [Post 2]: and now the attachments are gone as well... :/ [Post 3]: This could be issue 2581 -- that would explain the existence of attachments even as the body text is lost [Post 4]: I'm on LineageOS 16, Android Pie, and when I intentionally save drafts, while having the app set to not be optimized with battery use, I only occasionally lose all draft content. It was like this before I switched to 16. I have multiple accounts, and it does not seem to be a domain issue vs domain with sudomain addressing. It does not appear to involve the use of the clipboard. It's a glitchy problem. Maybe there is something running async that shouldn't be. I cannot make it happen. Edit: I read 2581 and yes, this is what I experience. The html version is online. Drafts save fine when just text. Add a hyperlink and they seem to fail sometimes. Version 5.6. So I deleted in. Online, I found it in the trash and message F9C2CB1C-B42B-48CA-B048-6666D081E3E1 confirmed to not have text, but has html: ------1VZ85MG2AP5NPY3WPTMI4HXLNTUFKR Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable ------1VZ85MG2AP5NPY3WPTMI4HXLNTUFKR Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Hi Bob,

Our records indicate [the rest of content removed]

Thanks! ------1VZ85MG2AP5NPY3WPTMI4HXLNTUFKR-- ## 价值模型参考 以下是可能涉及的价值类型及其定义： ### 人类价值主题 (L2) - **HV1 (Conformity)**: Adhering to rules, regulations, guidelines, or commonly accepted standards during application use or development. - **HV2 (Pleasure)**: Providing enjoyment and satisfaction to users when using the application. - **HV3 (Dignity)**: Maintaining users’ sense of dignity, respect, and personal worth when interacting with the application. - **HV4 (Inclusiveness)**: Enabling people from different backgrounds, languages, cultures, or knowledge levels to use the application. - **HV5 (Sense_of_Belonging)**: Supporting users’ feeling of being connected to a group or community through the application. - **HV6 (Freedom)**: Providing users with options and choices, and avoiding forced dependencies on specific services or workflows. - **HV7 (Independence)**: Reducing dependency on third-party services or external systems. - **HV8 (Wealth)**: Considering the monetary or economic cost associated with using the application. - **HV9 (Privacy)**: Protecting users’ personal information and addressing concerns about data collection or tracking. - **HV10 (Security)**: Protecting users from external threats or attacks when using the application. ### 系统价值主题 (L3) - **SV1 (Trust)**: Compelling users to believe that an application is harmless. - **SV2 (Correctness)**: Ensuring that the application provides expected information and behavior. - **SV3 (Compatibility)**: Supporting a range of user devices and operating systems. - **SV4 (Portability)**: Allowing the application to be migrated to other devices. - **SV5 (Reliability)**: Reducing the occurrence of application failures. - **SV6 (Efficiency)**: Reducing the time and effort required to perform tasks within the application. - **SV7 (Energy_Preservation)**: Reducing power or energy consumption during application use. - **SV8 (Usability)**: Improving the ease of use of the application. - **SV9 (Accessibility)**: Improving access to information or functionality, particularly for users with special needs. - **SV10 (Longevity)**: Ensuring prolonged availability of the application in the future. ## 任务 请你以一个软件工程师和项目管理者的视角，回答以下两个问题： （1）上述Issue讨论是否涉及价值风险？请回答"是"或"否"。 （2）如果涉及价值风险，可能涉及哪些价值风险？请从上述价值模型中选择相关的价值类型，并说明原因。 ## 输出格式 请严格按照以下JSON格式输出： ```json { "has_value_risk": true/false, "identified_values": [ { "value_id": "价值ID（如HV1, SV1等）", "value_name": "价值名称", "confidence": 0.0-1.0之间的置信度, "reasoning": "识别该价值风险的理由" } ], "overall_analysis": "整体分析说明" } ```

metadata.issue_title: Lost draft text after process death
